name: Okeoghene Inikori
headline: Full-Stack & Mobile Developer
tagline: Building production apps with React, Next.js, Expo, Django, Laravel, and Firebase — from campus systems and marketplaces to fintech, logistics, and AI-powered products.
bio: I ship end-to-end products: Expo mobile apps paired with Next.js APIs and Django/Laravel backends deployed to Firebase, Render, and Vercel.
My work spans fintech, logistics, campus management, health coaching, artisan marketplaces, and AI-assisted writing — with strong focus on role-based dashboards, real-time data, and polished UX.
I integrate Genkit/LLM features, Firestore security rules, payment flows, and maps-based experiences across web and mobile.

projects.title: CampusConnect Pro
projects.description: Comprehensive campus management platform with admin analytics, student dashboards, enrollments, grades, fees, library, and attendance.
highlights: Role-based Firestore security with admin and student portals
Genkit-powered AI username suggestions
Real-time dashboards with TanStack Table and Recharts

projects.title: ArtizanSquare
projects.description: Three-tier marketplace connecting problem-solvers with clients — React web, Expo mobile, and Django REST API with maps and messaging.
highlights: Cross-platform: Vite SPA + Expo mobile + Django API on Render
Google/Apple sign-in, artisan discovery, reviews, and proposals
Celery, Redis, Cloudinary, and JWT refresh flows

projects.title: TRW Capital Finance
projects.description: Investment and fintech platform with crypto deposits, copy trading, referrals, KYC, and admin tooling for portfolio management.
highlights: Crypto deposit workflows with CoinMarketCap integration
Admin ROI seeding and synthetic transaction generator
Referral tree and premium dark UI

projects.title: SwiftSend
projects.description: Logistics platform for shipments with live Google Maps tracking, invoices, and separate customer and admin dashboards.
highlights: Public shipment tracking by ID
Haversine distance calculations and route visualization
Role-based routing for customers vs admins

projects.title: TrackWise (Trakwyze)
projects.description: AI health and fitness coaching with workouts, meals, nutrition tracking, and a companion Expo mobile app.
highlights: Mobile app calls Next.js API routes with Firebase auth
Genkit + Groq for coaching chat and health tips
Charts, notifications, and secure token storage

projects.title: CauseBloom
projects.description: Donation platform for charitable causes with PayPal, admin oversight, and hybrid Firebase + PostgreSQL architecture.
highlights: Donor signup and donation export for admins
Prisma + Supabase alongside Firestore
QR codes and email templates

projects.title: StyleAI
projects.description: AI writing assistant with tone control, style profiles, and DOCX/PDF import and export.
highlights: Genkit with Google AI and Mistral
Neon Postgres with Drizzle ORM and Auth.js
Dashboard analytics for writing sessions

projects.title: Online Banking Platform
projects.description: Laravel banking demo with accounts, transfers, 2FA, admin dashboard, and PDF statements.
highlights: Checking, savings, and business accounts with transfer review flow
Google Authenticator 2FA and DomPDF receipts
Pest test suite and Breeze auth

projects.title: Aiden Hospitality SaaS
projects.description: Property and booking management SaaS for establishments with rooms, reservations, and customization.
highlights: Multi-establishment dashboard
Google OAuth and JWT session handling
Tiered pricing by room limits

projects.title: Jhavis Couture
projects.description: Fashion e-commerce with lister portal, order management, and superadmin CMS.
highlights: Lister role for product management
ZeptoMail order notifications
i18n with modeltranslation

projects.title: Firestore Migration Tool
projects.description: Utility to migrate Firestore data and Auth users between Firebase projects with validation.
highlights: Dual-project credential setup
Batch writes and connection validation
Firebase Admin SDK

experience.title: Independent Full-Stack & Mobile Developer
experience.description: Designed and shipped 15+ production-oriented apps across fintech, logistics, education, health, and marketplaces using React, Next.js, Expo, Django, and Laravel.

experience.title: Mobile + API Integration
experience.description: Built Expo apps (ArtizanSquare, TrackWise) that authenticate via Firebase and consume Next.js API routes with secure token refresh.

experience.title: Firebase & Cloud Architecture
experience.description: Implemented Firestore security rules, migration tooling, Genkit AI flows, and deployments on Vercel, Render, and Firebase Hosting.
